death resist and s-key recharge are really important now so there's less room for extra slots

horla wants a lot of death resistance so if you have her on your team you can give her 2 death resistance wheels or 1 dr 1 skey and not feel really sad about it

also strength is really really useful for aurita since she's a multi-hit attacker like sorel so more strength whenever you can have it without trading off something equally or more important is always helpful
